booking.cancelledBody: The coaching session scheduled for {{date}} at {{time}} ({{timezone}}) has been cancelled by {{byWhom}}.
booking.rescheduledBody: Your coaching session with {{coachName}} has been moved.
booking.coachRescheduledByAdmin: The session with {{clientName}} has been moved.

general.resetPasswordBody: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below — this link expires in 1 hour.
general.resetPasswordIgnore: If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email. Your password won't change.
general.welcomeBody: You've been added to {{orgName}} on ARTES. Log in to get started.
general.idpReadyBody: Your coach has generated a new AI-powered Individual Development Plan using the GROW methodology. Log in to review your goals, milestones, and action steps.
general.idpReadySubject: Your Individual Development Plan is ready
general.paymentOverdueBody: This invoice is {{days}} day(s) overdue. Please pay immediately to avoid service interruption.
general.paymentDueBody: Payment is due on {{date}}. Please ensure timely payment.
general.alreadyPaid: If you have already paid, please disregard this message.
general.suspensionBody: Access to {{orgName}} on ARTES has been suspended.
general.suspensionRestore: To restore access, please settle the outstanding balance. Your data remains safe and will be fully available once the account is reactivated.
general.newEngagementBody: Hi {{firstName}}, {{coachName}} has started a coaching engagement with you.
general.newEngagementCta: You can view your sessions, goals, and progress in ARTES.
general.newSessionBody: Hi {{firstName}}, {{coachName}} has scheduled a coaching session with you.
general.postSessionBody: {{coachName}} has prepared a short reflection for you following your coaching session on {{date}}.
general.postSessionMotivation: Taking a few minutes to capture your thoughts while the session is fresh helps solidify your insights and keeps your growth on track.
